summary: Iteration 23 - Unified Auth & Customer Portal Testing. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working. Tested unified login (admin password flow + customer magic link flow), customer portal JWT auth, role separation (customer JWT blocked from admin endpoints), and mobile floating buttons dynamic positioning.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested new unified auth system: POST /api/auth/check-email (admin→needs_password, customer→needs_magic_link, unknown→unknown), POST /api/auth/request-magic-link (sends magic link email), POST /api/auth/verify-token (verifies token→returns JWT with role=customer), GET /api/customer/me (JWT auth, returns customer profile), GET /api/customer/dashboard (JWT auth, returns quotes/invoices/bookings/communications/timeline). Role separation verified: customer JWT gets 403 on /api/admin/* endpoints. Admin JWT has role=admin in payload. Frontend: UnifiedLogin.js at /login handles both admin (password step) and customer (magic link sent step). CustomerPortal.js at /portal supports JWT auth via localStorage + legacy token URL. Logout button redirects to /login. Portal without auth shows error with login link. Mobile floating buttons: cookie-visible→bottom:120px, cookie-dismissed→bottom:24px with smooth transition.

tests: Valid token returns JWT with role=customer
With customer JWT returns profile with role=customer
With customer JWT returns dashboard with quotes/invoices/bookings/communications/timeline

features: Email step with input and continue button
Customer email → Magic Link Sent step shown
data-testid attributes: unified-login-page, login-email-step, login-email-input, login-continue-btn, login-password-step, login-password-input, login-admin-btn, login-magic-link-sent
Dashboard with tabs: Übersicht, Angebote, Rechnungen, Termine, Kommunikation, Aktivität
Without auth shows error with login link
